title: verdant dreams
description: Welcome to a verda oh wanderer fight and adventure death will be plentiful but will you join they're ranks?
body:
this mod pack adds too many bosses too many mods a couple dimensions a boat load of mobs it has shaders weapons ranged ones like bows crossbows and melee weapons swords gloves a lot of other sharp hurty things also has origins so you can have classes and differant origins and magic a lot of magic and dragons cause why not good luck took for 400 hours to most of the stuff in the mod pack and im still missing a few hundred items so have fun ^^

nothing else was ever here im not adding quests im too lazy 

ALSO i recomend using from like 8k-14k ram for good frame's
